roadmap.goal: Slice 05 (Story 5269): Jira flagged via a predefined (system-owned) additional field. Introduce an additive IsPredefined flag on AdditionalFieldDefinition, auto-register the Jira Flagged field via the new IWorkTrackingConnector.GetPredefinedAdditionalFields port method (Jira [Flagged], ADO/Linear/Csv []), exclude predefined fields from user CRUD reconcile + license slot count + write-back targets (inbound-only, immutable Reference), route the flag through the generic id-keyed additional-field/rule path, delete the synthetic Flagged label hack in IssueFactory, and split the FE editable list on isPredefined.
roadmap.overview: Sequenced foundation-first per ADR-071 DELIVER gates. 05-01 lands the additive model flag + EF migration (all providers via CreateMigration PS). 05-02 declares the GetPredefinedAdditionalFields port FIRST, implements it across the 4 connectors, adds the BE DTO isPredefined flag, wires GET-time idempotent auto-registration through IWorkTrackingConnectorFactory, and adds the WAF DI seam (mirror the ILicenseService fake) so the predefined field surfaces without live Jira. 05-03..05-05 add the three exclusions (reconcile merge-back, slot-count where !IsPredefined, inbound-only write-back + Reference immutability). 05-06 drives AC1/AC4 flagged-reads-blocked through the generic rule path (shipped slice-01) and 05-07 deletes the IssueFactory synthetic-label injection + rewires the flag as an additional-field value in the Jira connector. 05-08 splits the FE editor on isPredefined. 05-09 pins the 5 ADR-071 architectural-enforcement unit tests. Deferral escape valve (ADR-071 gate 3): if any enforcement test reveals coupling beyond these four surfaces, re-slice or defer rather than carry debt.

validation.notes: Slice-05 roadmap. Content is fully determined by the committed DISTILL gates (f9925e5d): red-classification.md slice-05 rows #37-#48 + FE, ADR-071 Amendment A+B, and distill/upstream-issues.md DELIVER gates. Authored by the orchestrator from the frozen spec rather than re-derived by a subagent architect (no open design question). Each step maps to a RED [Ignore]/describe.skip scenario that flips GREEN. Automated quality gate: no AC references private methods; steps/files ratio <2.5; no identical-pattern batching; every step has files_to_modify + test_file + scenario_name; ids match ^0\d-0\d$. DISTILL linkage complete.

out_of_scope: Any predefined field auto-registered for non-Jira connectors (ADO/Linear/Csv must contribute [] this slice)
New rule operators (the existing six suffice)
Lighthouse-Clients CLI/MCP version-gate for the changed additional-field contract (separate repo, ADR-072 handoff)
Any change to user-managed additional-field CRUD behaviour beyond excluding predefined fields from it

phases.name: Jira flagged via a predefined (system-owned) additional field
phases.description: Additive IsPredefined concept threaded through the four known surfaces (CRUD reconcile, license slot gate, connector auto-registration via port seam, DTO split) plus the generic rule path and the synthetic-label cleanup. ADR-071 (amended 2026-07-11, SPIKE waived).

steps.name: Add additive IsPredefined flag to AdditionalFieldDefinition + generate EF migration
steps.description: Add a `public bool IsPredefined { get; set; }` (default false) to Models/AdditionalFieldDefinition.cs. Generate the additive AddIsPredefinedToAdditionalFieldDefinition migration for ALL providers using the existing CreateMigration PowerShell script (NOT dotnet ef migrations add directly). Enable the [Ignore]-pending PredefinedAdditionalFieldMigrationTests (SQLite + Postgres) which read the column via raw SQL and assert it defaults to false.
criteria: IsPredefined bool added to AdditionalFieldDefinition, defaults to false (expand-only / non-destructive per feedback_expand_only_migrations)
Migration generated via the CreateMigration PS script across all supported providers (Sqlite + Postgres at minimum)
Both [Ignore] attributes removed from PredefinedAdditionalFieldMigrationTests; both tests GREEN (column present, defaults false)
dotnet build zero warnings (TreatWarningsAsErrors); dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: the migration probe (raw-SQL column read on real providers) is the acceptance contract — implement to GREEN, do not author new tests. InMemory misses migrations, hence the Testcontainers/SQLite pair (mirrors BlockedStalenessThresholdMigrationTests). Use the CreateMigration script (CLAUDE.md EF Migrations rule) — do NOT invoke dotnet ef migrations add. Additive column only; no destructive/Recreate.

steps.name: Declare GetPredefinedAdditionalFields port + 4 connector impls + BE DTO isPredefined + GET-time idempotent auto-registration + WAF DI seam
steps.description: PORT FIRST (ADR-071 DELIVER gate 1): declare IWorkTrackingConnector.GetPredefinedAdditionalFields(WorkTrackingSystemConnection) -> IReadOnlyList<AdditionalFieldDefinition>. Implement Jira -> [Flagged] (IsPredefined=true, Reference resolved deterministically from the connection's flagged mapping WITHOUT a live Jira call), ADO/Linear/Csv -> []. Add isPredefined to AdditionalFieldDefinitionDto (BE, serialized camelCase). Wire GET-time idempotent get-or-create auto-registration in WorkTrackingSystemConnectionController.GetWorkTrackingSystemConnection via IWorkTrackingConnectorFactory: merge the connector's predefined fields into connection.AdditionalFieldDefinitions keyed by (Reference where IsPredefined), persist once, serve. Add the WAF DI seam in BlockedItemsAcceptanceTest (mirror the ILicenseService fake) so a Jira connection surfaces exactly one predefined Flagged field without live Jira. GREENs the port-seam parametrized scenario (x4 connectors) + idempotency scenario.
criteria: IWorkTrackingConnector.GetPredefinedAdditionalFields(connection) declared on the interface BEFORE any impl lands (signature per ADR-071 Amendment B)
Jira returns exactly one predefined Flagged field (IsPredefined=true); ADO/Linear/Csv return []
AdditionalFieldDefinitionDto exposes isPredefined (camelCase); connection GET serves it
GET-time auto-registration is idempotent get-or-create (re-read surfaces exactly one predefined field, no duplicate, no =true sentinel row) keyed by Reference where IsPredefined
WAF DI seam registers a Jira connector whose GetPredefinedAdditionalFields returns [Flagged] without a live Jira call (mirror LicenseServiceMock RemoveAll+AddScoped)
GREEN: Only_a_jira_connection_contributes_a_predefined_flagged_field (Jira/ADO/Linear/Csv) + A_jira_connection_surfaces_exactly_one_predefined_field_stably; walking skeleton still green
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: black-box connection GET/PUT ATs assert on served JSON (isPredefined never referenced as a typed member in the tests) — implement to GREEN. This is the pivotal step. Reference resolution WITHOUT live Jira: the Jira flagged custom-field reference is normally resolved from FieldNames[connectionId][FlaggedName]; in the WAF host there is no live resolution, so the WAF DI seam supplies a Jira connector returning a Flagged predefined field with a deterministic Reference (e.g. customfield_10001). The port is on the driven IWorkTrackingConnector boundary; the merge-site call from the controller GET must stay thin (ADR-071 DELIVER gate 4 — not over-coupled). Factory: IWorkTrackingConnectorFactory.GetWorkTrackingConnector(connection.WorkTrackingSystem). If coupling exceeds these surfaces, invoke the deferral escape valve (gate 3) and report.

steps.name: Reconcile merge-back — a settings save omitting the predefined field must not delete it
steps.description: In WorkTrackingSystemConnectionController.UpdateAdditionalFieldDefinitions, exclude IsPredefined fields from the user-editable reconcile set entirely: they are never candidates for removal (never in toRemove) and are not created/edited from the incoming user payload. A user PUT that omits predefined fields preserves them. GREEN A_settings_save_that_omits_the_predefined_field_preserves_it.
criteria: UpdateAdditionalFieldDefinitions never removes an IsPredefined field regardless of the incoming payload (filtered out of toRemove)
Predefined fields are not mutated by the incoming user payload (Reference/DisplayName owned by auto-registration)
GREEN A_settings_save_that_omits_the_predefined_field_preserves_it; existing user-field reconcile behaviour unchanged (walking skeleton + Slice01-04 green)
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN the merge-back AT. This is ADR-071 waived-SPIKE answer 1. Keep the change scoped to the reconcile method; predefined identity = IsPredefined flag on the existing model rows.

steps.name: License slot-count excludes predefined fields (count where !IsPredefined)
steps.description: AdditionalFieldsHelper.SupportsAdditionalFields counts only user fields (where !IsPredefined) against the non-premium limit, so a predefined field does not consume a user slot. GREEN A_predefined_field_does_not_consume_a_user_field_slot_on_a_non_premium_connection.
criteria: SupportsAdditionalFields counts additionalFields.Where(f => !f.IsPredefined) against the < 2 non-premium limit
A non-premium Jira connection with 1 predefined field can still add 1 user field
GREEN A_predefined_field_does_not_consume_a_user_field_slot_on_a_non_premium_connection; existing premium/non-premium slot behaviour unchanged
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN. ADR-071 waived-SPIKE answer 2. One-line predicate change; verify no other SupportsAdditionalFields caller regresses.

steps.name: Predefined field is inbound-only — Reference immutable + excluded from write-back targets
steps.description: A predefined field's Reference cannot be changed by a settings save (immutable after auto-registration), and it is never persisted as a WriteBackMappingDefinition target. A PUT that tampers the predefined Reference or targets it with a write-back mapping is a no-op for those aspects. GREEN A_predefined_field_is_inbound_only.
criteria: A settings save cannot change a predefined field's Reference (immutable; owned by auto-registration)
Write-back mapping definitions targeting a predefined field id are rejected/dropped (not persisted)
GREEN A_predefined_field_is_inbound_only; existing write-back mapping behaviour for user fields unchanged (WriteBackMappingValidator still applies)
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN. ADR-071 waived-SPIKE answer 3 (WriteBackMappingDefinition.AdditionalFieldDefinitionId can target a field -> predefined must be excluded). Drop write-back mappings whose AdditionalFieldDefinitionId points at a predefined field in UpdateWriteBackMappingDefinitions; enforce Reference immutability in the predefined merge-back path.

steps.name: AC1/AC4 — a flagged item reads blocked through the generic id-keyed field path, no synthetic label
steps.description: Drive the flagged field through the generic additionalField.{id} rule path shipped in slice-01: a blocked rule referencing the flagged field reads a flagged item blocked (and a non-flagged item not blocked), with no synthetic Flagged label on tags. Verify empirically whether the slice-01 generic path already satisfies this (PASS-WHEN-ENABLED) or needs a targeted fix. GREEN A_flagged_item_reads_blocked_through_the_flagged_field_without_a_synthetic_label + The_flagged_field_value_drives_blocked_through_the_generic_field_path (true/false).
criteria: GREEN A_flagged_item_reads_blocked_through_the_flagged_field_without_a_synthetic_label
GREEN The_flagged_field_value_drives_blocked_through_the_generic_field_path for flagged=true (blocked) and flagged=false (not blocked)
No synthetic Flagged label appears on the item's tags in the WIP read
If the slice-01 generic rule path already covers this, remove the [Ignore] with no production change; else make the minimal generic-path fix (no flagged special-casing)
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN via the GENERIC path only — no flagged-specific branch. Slice-01 already ships rule-based IsBlocked over additionalField.{id} isnotempty (A_custom_field_condition_makes_an_item_read_blocked). SeedWorkItem sets AdditionalFieldValues[FlaggedFieldId] directly, so these may be PASS-WHEN-ENABLED. Un-ignore, run, confirm the reason; only touch production if a genuine gap surfaces.

steps.name: Delete the synthetic Flagged label hack in IssueFactory + rewire the flag as an additional-field value
steps.description: Remove the IssueFactory L32-40 synthetic-label injection (labels.Add(JiraFieldNames.FlaggedName)) and the flaggedField label plumbing. The Jira flag now flows only through the generic additional-field value path (the flagged custom field is fetched into WorkItem.AdditionalFieldValues keyed by the predefined field id during sync, like any additional field). GREEN Slice05SyntheticLabelRemovalTests. Keep the IssueFactory API coherent (drop the now-unused flaggedField label behaviour; retain or remove the parameter per the connector rewire).
criteria: IssueFactory no longer injects JiraFieldNames.FlaggedName as a synthetic label (L32-40 deleted); grep confirms no FlaggedName-based label wiring remains
The flagged custom-field value flows into WorkItem.AdditionalFieldValues via the generic additional-field fetch (predefined field id), not a label
GREEN Slice05SyntheticLabelRemovalTests.A_flagged_jira_issue_is_built_without_a_synthetic_flagged_label
No existing Jira connector test regresses (flagged read now via the predefined field); dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN the behavioural AC3 test (grep-equivalent enforcement). This is the cleanup gate. Check callers of CreateIssueFromJson(..., flaggedField) at JiraWorkTrackingConnector L1096/L1160 and the FieldNames[...][FlaggedName] plumbing (L844/L856/L862/L864/L1092/L1136). The predefined-field value fetch must key the flagged custom field into AdditionalFieldValues by the predefined AdditionalFieldDefinition id (generic path). Existing tests asserting the old synthetic-label behaviour must be updated by the crafter or flagged to the orchestrator if they encode a shared contract.

steps.name: FE — editable additional-fields list filters out predefined fields (isPredefined)
steps.description: Add isPredefined?: boolean to the FE IAdditionalFieldDefinition model. AdditionalFieldsEditor filters the editable list to !isPredefined: a predefined field is not listed among editable fields, offers no edit/delete controls, and does not count against the free-plan field slot. Un-skip AdditionalFieldsEditor.predefined.test.tsx (describe.skip -> describe).
steps.scenario_name: does not list a predefined field among the editable fields
criteria: IAdditionalFieldDefinition gains optional isPredefined: boolean
AdditionalFieldsEditor editable list = fields.filter(f => !f.isPredefined); no edit/delete affordance for predefined; predefined excluded from the free-plan slot count
The rule field-key picker still includes predefined fields (unchanged — covered by the backend rule-key scenario)
describe.skip -> describe; all 3 pending specs GREEN + control still green
pnpm test green; pnpm build zero TS/Biome/Vite warnings
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: implement to GREEN the 3 pending Vitest specs (acceptance-designer owns authoring). Filter at the editable-list boundary only; do NOT strip predefined from the fields prop passed to the rule picker. ADR-071 waived-SPIKE answer 5 (FE DTO split).

steps.name: Pin the 5 ADR-071 architectural-enforcement unit tests
steps.description: Author the 5 ADR-071 Architectural-Enforcement unit tests that sharpen the black-box ATs at the unit layer, now that IsPredefined + GetPredefinedAdditionalFields exist: (1) UpdateAdditionalFieldDefinitions reconcile merge-back never removes a predefined field, (2) SupportsAdditionalFields counts where !IsPredefined, (3) write-back target exclusion + Reference immutability, (4) GetPredefinedAdditionalFields auto-registration idempotency (get-or-create), (5) the FE isPredefined DTO split (already covered by 05-08 Vitest — assert linkage). All 5 pass before merge (ADR-071 DELIVER gate 2).
criteria: All 5 ADR-071 architectural-enforcement checks pass (reconcile merge-back, slot-count where !IsPredefined, write-back exclusion + Reference immutable, auto-reg idempotency, FE isPredefined split)
If any enforcement test reveals coupling beyond the 4 known surfaces -> STOP, invoke the deferral escape valve (ADR-071 gate 3), report to orchestrator
Full Slice05 suite GREEN (backend HTTP + IssueFactory + migration pair + FE); no [Ignore]/describe.skip left on slice-05 scenarios
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green; pnpm test green
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: these enforcement tests are authored in DELIVER (per upstream-issues.md UC-5 — they exist only once the IsPredefined member + port method exist, so acceptance-designer could not author them at DISTILL). Prefer asserting on the production seams directly (unit-level on UpdateAdditionalFieldDefinitions / SupportsAdditionalFields / the write-back exclusion / the idempotent registration) rather than duplicating the black-box ATs. Keep them minimal and non-redundant (nw-test-optimizer discipline).
